title: cyperus undulatus
intro: Cyperus undulatus, also known as the wavy sedge or umbrella sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical preparations, making it a versatile remedy in folk medicine.
